$comment: D-CSUBSET-LOCAL-STATIC (MF-2): `static` in a for-init is a C 6.8.5p3 constraint violation — fail loud S_StaticStorageInForInit (0xE021) at the `static` token, never silently lower as an automatic loop var. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop the forDecl StaticKeyword gatedMarker -> the static silently routes to a hidden global with an empty for-init clause (no diagnostic).
